query.fId: file id — the file object's `id` (integer). fId=-1 is a no-op ping returning {"success":true}.
query.rId: the canonical 8-digit request id the file belongs to. MUST match or the call is rejected.

success.body: raw file bytes, with the file's real Content-Type (e.g. application/pdf). No Content-Disposition attachment header.

errors.403: {"error":"forbidden","message":"User has no access to this engagement"} — rId did not match the file's request, or aId is wrong
